authors: Jing Meng Haiyan Wang a School of Media and Communication; Institute of Global Communications
raw_title: Dancing with AI: The Impact of AI-Generated Images and Videos on Chinese Visual Journalism
title_en: Dancing with AI: The Impact of AI-Generated Images and Videos on Chinese Visual Journalism
title_zh: 与AI共舞：AI生成图像和视频对中国视觉新闻的影响
plain_summary_zh: 这篇研究探讨了人工智能生成的图像和视频如何影响中国的视觉新闻报道。它关注AI技术如何改变新闻制作和传播方式。
plain_summary_en: This research examines how AI-generated images and videos are affecting visual journalism in China. It focuses on how AI technology is changing news production and distribution methods.
research_direction_zh: 数字新闻中人工智能技术的应用与影响研究
research_direction_en: Research on the application and impact of artificial intelligence technology in digital journalism
